headline: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Reports $1.5B Q4 Net Sales and 10.6% Growth
summary: Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ:ZBRA) is one of the best AI stocks with huge upside potential. On February 12, Zebra Technologies reported a strong conclusion to 2025, with Q4 net sales reaching $1,475 million, which was a 10.6% increase year-over-year. This growth was led by the Connected Frontline segment, which saw sales rise to $854 million, […]
